response.justification: Mohammed Al-Said is a technically broad and experienced software engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on work across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and has recent exposure to AI-agent tooling in his current role. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level IC position requiring deep, demonstrated AI/ML expertise, recognized thought leadership in AI, and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers — none of which are present in this profile. His AI involvement is limited to a single role started in April 2025, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his experience skews toward software craftsmanship and niche open-source projects rather than cloud platform strategy or AI product leadership at scale.
strengths: ~20 years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum requirement
Entrepreneurial background via GISCollective (founded 2016) and early-stage startup work (WatchUp, Apon) demonstrates builder mentality and autonomy
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing emerging exposure to agentic AI workflows
concerns: No meaningful AI/ML depth: AI involvement is confined to one role started just one month ago with no prior AI products, platforms, or publications to demonstrate recognized expertise
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related technical field; both degrees are Bachelor's-level, one in fine arts
Profile is Staff Software Engineer level — no evidence of director-level scope, executive stakeholder advising, or strategic influence at the scale this role demands

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering tenure and entrepreneurial experience
